options.help: Test for a value matching an expression (e.g. the ABC% filter value finds all records that start with the characters ABC).
options.label: Value matches expression [LIKE]

options.help: Similar to LIKE, but case insensitive.
options.label: Matches expression - case insensitive [LIKE_NOCASE]
